Legend of the Paladins: The Forge
just so you guys know i made this, this is for our three person rps so no one will randomly join them
The day is beautiful... its peaceful, quiet, the kids in the town are having fun running around after each other.

i sigh as i walk out of Tota's shop after getting my newly formed burn scar over the left side of my face checked out and telling everyone goodbye as i go to run errands. a kid named Fear follows after me, wearing a hoodie with sleeves that are way too long and a black mask on over his face
he spots you as he is walking out of the forest along with his creature that has a dead rabbit in his mouth. He walks up to you and waves
Hey Lex and Fear, What are you guys doing?

Oh, im going to get some things addressed further... mainly these scar wounds, they've been bugging me after that fight with Hades.... 
Fear: Im just tagging along! I'm supposed to stay close to him or my powers dont work!
Ah makes sense.. Wouldn't Tota know about those? Who are you going to?
i pause for a moment and shrug
She said she didnt know how to fix them... every time she tried to it would turn back up... and that person....
i tap my chin a bit
Im not sure... she said to go to this other place in the town
Mar: huh.. Well do you mind if I tag along just to make sure you're going to be okay?
he gives a small smile and rubs the back of his neck
i look at him for a second

Well, I don't mind... what do you say Fear?
Fear: hmm, I think thats fine!
his smile grows a bit and he continues to walk along side you two
he swallows the rabbit whole while walking with you guys
we walk for a good distance to this slightly crowded area with a very large building in it
i look at it a bit

That looks like it from the description she gave me...
Fear: That a... large building...
he looks it up and down
huh... yeah, that's pretty big.. Is it safe?
Me: Well the area is crowded soo... i'd assume it would be...
i scratch my head and walk towards the door
sees im moving and follows me
he follows you two and his pet follows him

inside the building looks really nice and there are many people walking around in it, they are going in and out of rooms with various objects and it seems that there are a lot of androids and robots there

Me: Ah... Now I see why she wanted to bring me here...
Fear: ooooOOo!
he jumps up and down slightly
he looks around interested, but half glaring at everyone
a few of the people in there notice the creature and stare at it in awe
shuffles past them and goes to a reception desk with an android lady sitting there. I say a few things and she hands me some papers and points me to a room not too far away

You want us to stay out here?
Creature:
he looks quite cocky with all the people staring at him in awe
I look to the reception lady

Woman: Thats up to you! They can follow or stay here!
Me:

I don't mind if you follow, you can if you'd like...
Fear:
lightly jogs over next to me
he nods his head and sticks with you
he walks up next to Mar
I walk over to the room and knock on the door
a full robot in a suit opens the door and smiles, his name tag reading Ian

Ian: You must be lex, correct?
Me: Thats right!
I nod and shake his hand
Oh, excuse me... I am Ian, im going to see if i can address Lex's wounds today... you all are?
Fear: Im Fear! Nice to meet you!
Mar: Pleasure to meet you, I'm Mar!
he gives Ian a smile and points to the creature
And he's a thing, just ignore him.
BASK IN THE GLORY THAT IS ME! IKUMI, THE OVERLORD OF THE PEDOPHILES!
looks at her and just looks confused
most of the people in the building look at her really confused
Ikumi: YES! I'M HERE! DO NOT SPEAK IN MY PRESENCE!
looks at Lex and squints his eyes
stares at her and then looks down and clears my throat
I look back up at her
Ikumi: I'm just here to check out my brother conditions~ Thats all~
chuckles, sitting down in a seat, trying to clean cape
You came at a really bad time... im in pretty bad condition...
motions to the scar and my arm
looks at Ikumi like hes examining her
Ian: A-Anyways... Lex, I need you in here for a moment...
he steps next to the door and motions for me to enter
walks in and sits in a chair
jumps up then dives through the door, last minute
I'm staying with you, you can't get away from me brother.
runs through the door dragging Mar
waddles in and closes the door behind him
looks around me at my arm and my scar and sighs

Im surprised no one else could fix this, it looks simple enough... 
Me: Well, many have tried but it brings itself b-
Ian:
sticks a tube that comes from the ceiling into my arm
You could have warned me... b-before...

Mar: oh. What are you going to do to him?
Creature:
Ian: Sedating him... I've gotten word he causes trouble a lot so im airing on the safe side...
he shrugs and grabs some other things off of a table and starts closely examining my wounds
Ian: hmm... these seem magically induced, now i know why they are so hard to heal...
he backs up a bit and looks at me while thinking
he looks at Ian then at Lex's wounds
But you can heal it right?
Ikumi: Heh, maybe if your magic was as powerful as me, you'd be able to. Nevertheless, no power can stand to the Overlord of the Pedophiles~
I can heal it but its going to take a while and some other things...
Lets see, 1, 2, 3, 4 of you, perfect! could you all go to other rooms and get these things for me?

Some Medicine from the room directly above this one, a repair tool from Ann in the room two doors down, a syringe from Tom in room 34B, and a blood substitute from the medical ward three floors up...
Fear:
he runs out the door and searches for stairs
looks in between Ikumi and Fear then looks out the door
I'll actually just go in the repair tool...
he makes his way two doors down
Ian: You're going to get them all? Its much more efficient for us to split up between them all...
wanders out the door to look for the stairs as well, following the creature
Ikumi: I'll be getting the blood substitute~
he starts walking down the hall looking for room 34B
walks out of her door just before Mar gets there and looks up at him
Ikumi teleports into the center of the medical area and everyone looks at her curiously
the door is towards the end of the hallway
Ikumi: DO NOT FEAR, PEASANTS! IT IS I! IKUMI, THE PEDO OVERLORD! HER TO ASK, Where are the blood substitutes?

Mar: Ah, hi there! Do you have a repair tool?
Creature:
he walks down to the end of the hall and isnt sure what door it is, he cant read. He inhales and makes a loud screech sounding like "Tom"
peaks out of his door just next to the creature and looks at it mega confused

Why the fuck are you here?!
Ann: Aye, yes I do...
she quickly walks back into the room and starts to look around for it
Ikumi: Where the fuck are the blood substitutes, ma'am? I need one for my brother.
follows her to the door of her room and waits patiently
shoots his head towards Tom and walks into his room carefree. He looks around at his tables for a syringe
sighs loudly and walks into a room that comes off of the main area
she walks back out of the room and tosses mar the tool
just looks at the creature and seems to realize what hes looking for
In the drawer next to you...
he catches the tool and gives her a smile
Thanks, have a good day ma'am
he turns around and walks back to Ian's room
he looks at the drawer next to him and looks at his feet. He hooks his beak onto the handle and opens the drawer, taking the syringe and runs back down the hall
as Mar walks back into the room, Neither me nor Ian are in there and there is a side room with a door open
Lucy (kek this was supposed to be Lucy i dont know why I put Kat):
walks next to Ikumi and hands her a bloodbag
Ikumi: Thank you, friend, now I'm off~
reaches the room and looks at Mar confused
there is no response but some talking in the room coming off of the office, it sounds really robotic now
walks back in the room, looking around worriedly
walks into the side room looking around
runs through the door throwing the syringe on the floor and screeches
very ominously chuckles in a very evil and robotic sounding voice and points a gun at everyone entering the room
It was a mistake to come to us directly~
looks like my wounds have gotten worse
Grrr....You've done wrong to try the patience of the Overlord.
he looks worried and angry at the same time
Being an Overlord must be fun, am i right? Being able to command people how you want, deal with them how you want, kill any of them the way you like...
many more robots and androids come up behind everyone with various weapons
starts examining the room and all of the enemies entering the area
he halts and looks around at everyone
examines everyone entering the room and looks at Ikumi
Ah yes, except the only thing I do is sexually take advantage of lolis.
all of the other robots speak in his voice
attempts to make them see things that they are afraid of, but they dont react whatsoever
all of the robots laugh and raise their weapons at everyone
opens eyes but doesn't seem to be able to move
looks worried and runs in front of me, but can't do much else as for attacking
they both get close to Ikumi quickly
attempts to pull me to them but there isn't much effect
the robots all fire they're weapons and alarms in the building go off
Ikumi: BOKU NO PICO, SHIELD ME!
creates a barrier between the robots and us
the bullets from the weapons all bounce off of the shield and the robots look at the shield

Not bad, not bad at all... Expected by an Overlord~
Me:
my hand twitches, but im still unable to move much
seems mad and turns himself into smoke and disappears through a vent
disband barrier then forces through the crowd, picking up Lex, and taking him back to the group
while Ikumi runs through them, the robots attempt to grapple her and force her to the ground and try to grab me as well
jumps on top of a robot, pushing it to the ground and jumps to Lex shielding him
grabs the creature then everyone else
falls onto my back on the ground
is nowhere to be seen, must still be inside the place somewhere
nudges Lex with his beak making sure he's dead
coughs and sits my head up slightly
the robots turn to Ikumi's voice and fire their weapons at her

I didn't realize such a merciless Overlord would turn back for someone they just met~
Fear:
He appears floating in the air above the main room and a green yin and yang symbol appears on the ground that covers all of the facility, turning it dark
Can you walk or do you want him?
I stand up slowly and sigh
Of course it has to be a trap...
Mar: Do you think Tota knew?
surrounds herself with dark forces, deflecting the bullets
sees Ikumi but motions for her to get out, and the symbol on the floor starts spinning
I sure hope she didnt know...
Calm down, he'll be here soon.
Ikumi: No matter, it's only a matter of time, you say.
the dropping and clinking of metal can be heard, then silence, then the doors open and Fear waddles his way over to the group
he gives him a smile then looks at the place
Fear: I put them all in a dream! Fufu... or nightmare! Depends on how you look at it!
all of the robots and androids are laying on the floor, completely immobile
Me: Yeah... thats Fear for ya...
looks at Lex and looks nervous
teleports back out with a a sleeping Loli
snaps her finger, making the Loli teleport back to her base
You always have to cause trouble
turns into smoke and disappears, reappearing with the loli
It's my job, I have no choice~
holds on to the Loli and is kind of pulled with them

Then get a different job, its rude to steal people!
Me:
Hes a natural at stopping this stuff, its great!
smiles maniacally, then teleports away with Loli, and teleports back
I guess I'm rude then, just like my husband's father said~
falls on his face since he was holding onto the loli when it was teleported
Me: Its fine Fear, i'll get them back later...
walks out of the building looking really tired
Who the fuck did the magic shit... uhg...
Lucy: Ah the little shit did it eh...?
she stumbles her way over to him
sits up and shakes his head and points to Ikumi
Ikumi: Yes, it was me, IT WAS MY GREAT POWER!
she now looks really mad and her spider arms come off of her back
